CREATE TABLE demo_srv (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE demo_publication (id INT PRIMARY KEY, details VARCHAR(255));
GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON demo_srv TO repl_user;
GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON demo_publication TO repl_user;
SELECT * FROM demo_srv WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM demo_srv);
SELECT * FROM demo_publication WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM demo_publication WHERE details LIKE 'Publication%');
WITH synced_data AS (SELECT s.id, s.name FROM demo_srv s JOIN demo_publication p ON s.id = p.id) SELECT * FROM synced_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demo_srv WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM demo_publication p WHERE p.id = demo_srv.id);
CREATE VIEW active_sync AS SELECT id, name FROM demo_srv WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM demo_publication);
DELETE FROM demo_publication WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM demo_srv);
